name: wp16-live-run-policy-proof
goal: Use the local orchestrator on a tiny live read-only run that proves runPolicy surfaces and between-batch stop behavior on a retained manifest.

sharedContext.summary: Run one bounded live read-only workflow to prove that runPolicy is surfaced in validate/run/inventory outputs and enforced between batches without needing a write-capable pipeline.
constraints: Keep work read-only and bounded to orchestration guidance and the coordinator script.
Do not edit TODO.md, ai/state files, ai/log files, or ai/indexes.

tasks.title: Inspect run governance contract
tasks.prompt: Read the orchestration guide, system spec, and coordinator script. Summarize the current runPolicy contract and mention one operator caveat about between-batch stop behavior. Keep the response compact and read-only.

tasks.title: Follow up on governance calibration
tasks.prompt: Use the dependency output plus the same tracked contract files to propose one concrete next step for calibrating real runPolicy thresholds. Keep it short and do not broaden scope.
